headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Nasdaq, Lowers Price Target to $114
summary: Barclays  analyst Benjamin Budish   maintains Nasdaq (NASDAQ:NDAQ) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $116 to $114.
